query:
ALTER TABLE game_equipment_catalog
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS quality VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'white',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS hp_bonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS attack_bonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS defense_bonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS speed_bonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_bonus JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_1 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_2 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_3 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_4 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_5 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS craft_materials_list JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS set_id VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS hp_bonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS attack_bonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS defense_bonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS speed_bonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_bonus JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_1 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_2 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_3 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_4 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affix_5 JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS craft_materials_list JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS set_id VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL;
